title: ANC - Switch both ANC and Transparency to Off
scenario: ANC and Transparency sub-options are disabled and unselected when both are set to Off in Device Settings > ANC
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
6. Observe the ANC and Transparency Mode toggle states and sub-option selections.
7. Repeat steps 4-6 with ANC set to On and Transparency Mode set to Off.
8. Repeat steps 4-6 with ANC set to Off and Transparency Mode set to On.
expected: When both ANC and Transparency Mode are set to Off, both toggles should be disabled/greyed out and none of the sub-options should be selected. When either ANC or Transparency Mode is On, the respective toggle should be enabled and its sub-options should be selectable.
